rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §29.167 governs prekindergarten curriculum and teacher qualifications. The two provisions address unrelated subjects; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.167. HIGH QUALITY CURRICULUM AND TEACHER REQUIREMENTS.
_note: No overlap between the proposed property tax exemption increase and this prekindergarten curriculum/teacher requirement statute.
